channel.title: Building Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Building Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO DREAMZzz Mrs. Castillo’s Turtle Van 71456 2 in 1 Building Toy and Vehicle Playset with Party Mode or Flying Submarine Mode Makes a Great Gift Idea for 7 Year Old Kids Boys and Girls
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DREAMZzz Mrs. Castillo’s Turtle Van 71456 2 in 1 Building Toy and Vehicle Playset with Party Mode or Flying Submarine Mode Makes a Great Gift Idea for 7 Year Old Kids Boys and Girls at the following link: ℹ️: 2 ways to build – With multiple ways to build the toy van inspired by the LEGO DREAMZzz TV show, kids can choose between party mode or flying submarine mode Party mode – Kids can accessorize the van with a moving tree, a spinning cactus and an opening treasure chest Flying submarine mode – Children can add a rocket and moving periscope as accessories to the van.

item.title: LEGO Disney Frozen Elsa’s Frozen Treats Building Set includes Elsa Mini-Doll and a Snowgie Figure Elsa Toy Makes a Fun Gift for Girls and Boys who Love Frozen Toys Disney Princess Doll 43234
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Disney Frozen Elsa’s Frozen Treats Building Set includes Elsa Mini-Doll and a Snowgie Figure Elsa Toy Makes a Fun Gift for Girls and Boys who Love Frozen Toys Disney Princess Doll 43234 here: ℹ️: Elsa and the Snowgie – The building set includes an ice-cream toy cart, an Elsa toy mini-doll, Snowgie figure and 2 collectible rings with interchangeable decorations Disney Frozen fun for kids ages 5+ – Girls and boys will enjoy playing with this Elsa’s Frozen Treats building toy set and inspire creativity as kids imagine and play out their own stories Gift for kids ages 5+ – A fun everyday Disney Princess gift idea for girls and boys who enjoy the Frozen movies.

item.title: LEGO Cherry Blossoms Celebration Gift Buildable Floral Display for Creative Kids White and Pink Cherry Blossom Spring Flower Gift for Girls and Boys Aged 8 and Up 40725
item.description: You can find LEGO Cherry Blossoms Celebration Gift Buildable Floral Display for Creative Kids White and Pink Cherry Blossom Spring Flower Gift for Girls and Boys Aged 8 and Up 40725 with a discount here: ℹ️: Measurements – The set includes 430 pieces and each cherry blossom twig measures over 14 in. (35 cm) long Customize the flowers – Builders can combine the colors of the buds to create 2 unique stems Celebration gifts – The spring flower cherry blossoms can be given as a gift for kids with green thumbs, Valentine’s Day gift idea, or Mother’s Day gift for nature-lovers LEGO bouquet – The cherry blossoms can be combined with other LEGO flowers (sold separately) to create a colorful arrangement Beautiful spring colors – This LEGO set features 2 cherry blossom cuttings covered in buds in hues of pastel pink and white to create wonderful room decor.

item.title: LEGO City Space Construction Mech Suit Building Set Fun Space Toy for Kids Ages 6 and Up Space Gift Idea for Boys and Girls Who Love Imaginative Play includes Pilot Minifigure and Robot Toy 60428
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO City Space Construction Mech Suit Building Set Fun Space Toy for Kids Ages 6 and Up Space Gift Idea for Boys and Girls Who Love Imaginative Play includes Pilot Minifigure and Robot Toy 60428 here: ℹ️: Toy mech suit for ages 6 and up – LEGO City space toy for futuristic play includes an articulated mech suit with hammer and claw tool arms, a minifigure pilot cockpit and big feet for exploring new worlds More sets to collect – Kids unleash more fun and adventures when they add this set to others (sold separately) from the LEGO City space range Digital construction guide – Take your space enthusiast on a fun building adventure with the LEGO Builder app, which lets kids view models from all angles as they build Open-ended play – LEGO City space playsets come with realistic vehicles, detailed structures and inspiring characters that merge fantasy and reality for imaginative play without limits What’s in this LEGO building set?

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Town Water Park 10989 Educational Building Bath Toy Set for Toddlers Ages 2+ Features a Floating Turtle Ring and Water Bucket to Encourage Imaginative Play in The Bath
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DUPLO Town Water Park 10989 Educational Building Bath Toy Set for Toddlers Ages 2+ Features a Floating Turtle Ring and Water Bucket to Encourage Imaginative Play in The Bath at the following link: ℹ️: Building fun at bath time – This toy playset measures over 8.5 in. (22 cm) high, 10 in. (25 cm) wide and 7.5 in. (19 cm) deep and is part of a range (sold separately) of LEGO DUPLO bath toys Fun floating toy to build in the tub – This bath-time toy comes with a floating island and turtle ring, flexible palm tree with a water bucket, octopus slide, 2 child figures, a sea star and rain-cloud pourers Kids’ educational bath toy – Make a splash at bath time with the Water Park (10989) toy, a creative playset for toddler boys and girls ages 2+ that develops number recognition and fine motor skills Gift for preschoolers – A hands-on treat for toddlers ages 2 and up for birthdays, special occasions or just because Toy that grows imaginations – Kids build skills and learn numbers in the bath as they stack bricks to make the tree grow and accompany the toy figure to explore the features of a fun water park 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Creator Main Street 31141 Building Toy Set 3 in 1 Features a Toy City Art Deco Building Market Street Hotel Café Music Store and 6 Minifigures Endless Play Possibilities for Boys and Girls
item.description: You can find LEGO Creator Main Street 31141 Building Toy Set 3 in 1 Features a Toy City Art Deco Building Market Street Hotel Café Music Store and 6 Minifigures Endless Play Possibilities for Boys and Girls with a discount here: ℹ️: 3 in 1 toy – Kids can play out exciting city stories with this LEGO Creator 3in1 Main Street (31141) playset, featuring 3 models in 1: a toy city street, an art deco building and a market Cafe Endless play – LEGO fans ages 9 years old can build and rebuild 3 different city scenes: a street with a hotel, music store, record store and café, a 4-floor art deco apartment building, or an archway market street 6 minifigures – Includes a coffee shop worker, a hotel receptionist, a singer, a wheelchair user, a child and a store clerk.

item.title: LEGO DOTS Disney Mickey & Friends Bracelets Mega Pack 41947 5in1 Crafts Set DIY Toy Jewelry Making Kit for Kids with Glitter and Minnie Mouse Tiles
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DOTS Disney Mickey & Friends Bracelets Mega Pack 41947 5in1 Crafts Set DIY Toy Jewelry Making Kit for Kids with Glitter and Minnie Mouse Tiles at the following link: ℹ️: This kids friendship bracelet making kit features 5 adjustable toy bracelets in different colors plus Mickey Mouse & Friends decorated tiles Kids can lay the colorful LEGO DOTS bracelets out and snap on the Mickey & Friends-decorated tiles to express their mood and creativity This LEGO DOTS set is great on its own or kids can also use Extra DOTS – Series bags or boxes (sold separately) to expand their designs This fun bracelet-making crafts set lets young designers practice their creations and share or wear them; easy design inspiration also included Crafts loving kids can pick the classic red, white and black Mickey style or a more bold, colorful one and then, redesign the set at any time!

item.title: LEGO Disney Princess Aurora s Castle Building Toy Set 43211 Disney Princess Toy with Sleeping Beauty Prince Philip and Maleficent Mini-Doll Figures Disney Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls Age 4+
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Disney Princess Aurora s Castle Building Toy Set 43211 Disney Princess Toy with Sleeping Beauty Prince Philip and Maleficent Mini-Doll Figures Disney Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls Age 4+ here: ℹ️: There are 2 mini-builds included in the playset; a buildable swing and Maleficents throne with green gems, a cauldron and a vial of potion This LEGO Disney Princess buildable toy encourages kids to play out favorite film scenes or reimagine daily life in the castle with new stories Fans of Disneys Sleeping Beauty and cool buildable castle toys will love this playset as a special birthday gift for kids Ages 4 plus years old Disney Princess fans can play in the buildable castle toy with the dancing platform, kitchen, bedroom and balcony, a staircase and a cool slide This LEGO | Disney Princess buildable toy features a castle with a spinning dance floor, 3 mini-doll figures, Maleficents throne and a toy swing This LEGO 4+ set comes with starter bricks which give youngsters a sturdy base for their build, plus each bag of bricks contains a character Includes Aurora, Prince Philip and Maleficent LEGO mini-doll figures, plus cool accessories: a crown, staff, butterflies, toy cupcakes and chalices 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: Lego Marvel Iron Man Armory Toy Building Set 76216 Avengers Gift for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Iron Man Pretend Play Toy Marvel Building Kit with MK3 MK25 and MK85 Suit Minifigures
item.description: You can find Lego Marvel Iron Man Armory Toy Building Set 76216 Avengers Gift for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Iron Man Pretend Play Toy Marvel Building Kit with MK3 MK25 and MK85 Suit Minifigures with a discount here: ℹ️: This LEGO set makes a great birthday or Christmas gift for all young Avengers fans, boys and girls who love toys based on the Marvel Universe Children can use the platform to change Tony Starks Avengers armor and carry out repairs using the included tool accessories This fun-filled set puts endless Iron Man action into the hands of young Super Heroes Ages 7+ and fans of the Marvel Studios Infinity Saga This LEGO Marvel building toy features Tony Starks headquarters with his Hall of Armor room, high-tech Iron Man suits and a workshop area Includes 5 minifigures of Tony Stark, Pepper Potts, Nick Fury, War Machine and Whiplash and 3 high tech battle suits: the MK3, MK25 and MK85 Includes digital instructions with the LEGO Building Instructions app, allowing children to zoom and rotate while building the model Features a toy sports car with Stark Expo model-map, robot assistant arm, workshop area with tools, 3 holographic displays, and changing platform 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Fantasy Forest Creatures Woodland Animal Toys Set Transforms from Rabbit to Owl to Squirrel Figures Gift for 7 Plus Year Old Girls and Boys 31125
item.description: You can find LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Fantasy Forest Creatures Woodland Animal Toys Set Transforms from Rabbit to Owl to Squirrel Figures Gift for 7 Plus Year Old Girls and Boys 31125 with a discount here: ℹ️: Using the LEGO Building Instructions app, builders can zoom, rotate and visualize a digital version of their models on their smartphones LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Fantasy Forest Creatures brings 3 animal scenes in 1 set with 5 toy animal figures to create Kids can choose between the owl teaching the hedgehog to read, playing with the young deer and toy rabbit, or finding acorns with the squirrel This animal toy for boys and girls 7 plus years old features a brick-built LEGO owl and a hedgehog, a young deer and a toy rabbit, or a squirrel The young deer has posable legs and feet, and the toy rabbit can move its ears, while the squirrel has posable limbs and ears The owl toy has posable feet, wings, head & feathers; its a portable size with 4"/10cm height for kids to take with them on their travels Look out for others in the LEGO Creator 3 in 1 collection, including the Space Shuttle (31134), Beach Camper Van (31138) and Cozy House (31139) sets 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Wolverine Construction Figure 76257 Buildable Marvel Action Figure Fully Jointed Marvel Collectible with 6 Claw Elements for Play and Display X-Men Super Hero Gift for Kids Ages 8-12
item.description: You can find LEGO Marvel Wolverine Construction Figure 76257 Buildable Marvel Action Figure Fully Jointed Marvel Collectible with 6 Claw Elements for Play and Display X-Men Super Hero Gift for Kids Ages 8-12 with a discount here: ℹ️: A set for Wolverine fans – This fully jointed LEGO Marvel Wolverine Construction Figure (76257) puts endless imaginative adventures into the hands of young superheroes Portable play – Standing over 9 in. (22 cm) tall, this versatile Marvel collectible figure lets kids take their adventures with them wherever they go Iconic Super Hero – The 327-piece Wolverine figure features movie-accurate details, including extended claws and movable shoulder, arm, hip and leg joints Easy to position and pose – Kids adjust the buildable Marvel action figure to recreate Wolverine’s action poses as they play out missions from the Marvel movies and endless adventures of their own Marvel toys for boys and girls ages 8-12 – Give this hands-on play figure to young superheroes ages 8-12 as a birthday, holiday or just-because treat 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO NINJAGO Nya and Arin’s Baby Dragon Battle 71798 Ninja Building Toy Features a Jet 2 Dragons 3 Minifigures and Baby Riyu Gift Idea for Toddlers Ages 4+
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO NINJAGO Nya and Arin’s Baby Dragon Battle 71798 Ninja Building Toy Features a Jet 2 Dragons 3 Minifigures and Baby Riyu Gift Idea for Toddlers Ages 4+ here: ℹ️: Beginner LEGO set – Toddlers ages 4+ can recreate scenes from the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV series as they learn to build with the Nya and Arin’s Baby Dragon Battle (71798) playset A gift for kids aged 4+ – This playset makes a great gift offering passionate ninja fans countless ways to enjoy adventures with their ninja heroes A new way to build – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure.

item.title: LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Center 41736 Building Toy for Ages 7+ with 3 Mini-Dolls 2 Otters a Seahorse Turtle and Water Scooter a Great Birthday Gift for Pretend Ocean Rescue Play
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Center 41736 Building Toy for Ages 7+ with 3 Mini-Dolls 2 Otters a Seahorse Turtle and Water Scooter a Great Birthday Gift for Pretend Ocean Rescue Play at the following link: ℹ️: A helping hand – Discover intuitive instructions in the LEGO Builder app, where builders can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track their progress and save sets as they develop new skills Accessories inspire play – The set comes with lots of accessories, including a life vest, brush, feeding bottle, walkie-talkie, treasure chest, camera, microscope, syringe and an X-ray machine 3 mini-dolls and accessories – The LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Center set comes with characters Autumn, Leo and Kayla, plus 2 sea otter characters, a seahorse and a sea turtle accessory Sized for young builders – The LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Center measures over 9 in.

item.title: LEGO DREAMZzz Mr. Oz’s Spacebus Building Set Spaceship Toy for Kids Space Shuttle School Bus Unique Space Travel Gift for 9+ Year Olds 71460
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DREAMZzz Mr. Oz’s Spacebus Building Set Spaceship Toy for Kids Space Shuttle School Bus Unique Space Travel Gift for 9+ Year Olds 71460 at the following link: ℹ️: Blast off into the dream world – Kids can enjoy imaginative play with the LEGO DREAMZzz Mr. Oz’s Spacebus (71460) building set, inspired by the adventures from the new LEGO DREAMZzz TV show A helping hand – The set features story-led building instructions, which are also available digitally in the LEGO Builder app 2 ways to build – Kids can choose to customize the space toy with rockets and blasters or build a huge cannon, starfighter and mini-spaceship to accompany it A space adventure – The set lets kids play at joining Mr.

item.title: LEGO DREAMZzz Grimkeeper The Cage Monster 71455 Building Toy Transforms from Z-Blob Robot to Mini-Plane to Hoverbike Great for Imaginative and Pretend Play Unique Birthday Gift for 7+ Year Olds
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DREAMZzz Grimkeeper The Cage Monster 71455 Building Toy Transforms from Z-Blob Robot to Mini-Plane to Hoverbike Great for Imaginative and Pretend Play Unique Birthday Gift for 7+ Year Olds at the following link: ℹ️: Choose the adventure – Kids can choose between turning Z-Blob into a robot, mini-plane or a hoverbike to re-enact the nightmare battle A helping hand – The set features story-led building instructions, which are also available digitally in the LEGO Builder app Fully articulated – The Grimkeeper has a fully articulated torso, arms and legs so kids can recreate different scenes and poses Hours of play – The set is designed for kids ages 7 and up to role play with their favorite characters, including Mateo and Cooper minifigures.

item.title: LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Plane 41752 Building Toy Creative Fun for Girls and Boys Ages 6+ includes 2 Mini-Dolls and a White Whale Plus Lots of Accessories A Fun Gift for Kids Who Love Sea Life
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Plane 41752 Building Toy Creative Fun for Girls and Boys Ages 6+ includes 2 Mini-Dolls and a White Whale Plus Lots of Accessories A Fun Gift for Kids Who Love Sea Life at the following link: ℹ️: Accessories for role play – Comes with a life jacket, paddleboard, paddle, walkie-talkies, binoculars, feeding bottle and a wrench to rescue the whale Let’s tell a story – Kids can act out the drama as Zac discovers the stranded whale while paddleboarding and then calls his mentor, who arrives in the sea rescue plane A helping hand – Discover intuitive instructions in the LEGO Builder app, where builders can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track their progress and save sets as they develop new skills Animal rescue stories for kids aged 6+ – Kids who love sea creatures can enjoy their own rescue adventures as they build and play with this fun LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Plane (41752) set A gift for kids who love wildlife – This LEGO Friends set makes a gift idea for any child aged 6 and up who would love to build their own toy rescue airplane and create their own adventures Sized for young builders – The LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Plane measures over 3.

item.title: LEGO DREAMZzz Pegasus Flying Horse 71457 Building Toy Set Fantasy Action Figure Creature Comes with 3 Minifigures Including The Nightmare King Unique Birthday Gift for Girls and Boys Ages 8+
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DREAMZzz Pegasus Flying Horse 71457 Building Toy Set Fantasy Action Figure Creature Comes with 3 Minifigures Including The Nightmare King Unique Birthday Gift for Girls and Boys Ages 8+ here: ℹ️: Bring the story to life – Kids can enjoy imaginative play with the LEGO DREAMZzz Pegasus Flying Horse (71457) building toy set, inspired by the adventures from the LEGO DREAMZzz TV show Dimensions – At its largest, the pegasus flying horse stands over 8 in.

item.title: LEGO My City Apartment Building 60365 Toy Set with Connecting Three Floor Room Modules includes a Mobility Scooter Bike and 6 Minifigures for Imaginative Role Play Fun Gift Idea for Kids
item.description: You’ve got LEGO My City Apartment Building 60365 Toy Set with Connecting Three Floor Room Modules includes a Mobility Scooter Bike and 6 Minifigures for Imaginative Role Play Fun Gift Idea for Kids at the following link: ℹ️: Expandable toy playset – Includes a LEGO Road Plate for connection to other sets in the LEGO City What’s in the box? – This toy set includes a toy apartment block with pretend solar panels, a convenience store, living room, kitchen, bedroom and bathroom, plus a bike, mobility scooter and 6 minifigures Take gifting to the next level – This modular apartment playset makes a fun birthday, holiday or any-day gift for 6 year old kids and fans of imaginative play Build and play toy Apartment Building – This LEGO City Apartment Building (60365) comes with connecting modular rooms and fun characters for kids who love realistic play Dimensions – When built, the Apartment Building measures over 13 in.

item.title: LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Super Robot Building Kit Kids Can Build a Toy Robot or a Toy Dragon or a Model Jet Plane Makes a Creative Gift for Kids Boys Girls Age 7+ Years Old 31124
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Super Robot Building Kit Kids Can Build a Toy Robot or a Toy Dragon or a Model Jet Plane Makes a Creative Gift for Kids Boys Girls Age 7+ Years Old 31124 here: ℹ️: The Super Robot toy for kids 7+ years old lets them enjoy a 3 models in 1 set: a toy robot, a dragon figure and a toy LEGO jet plane Kids can play out futuristic stories with the robot toy, roar into action with the dragon model or soar into the sky with the toy jet plane LEGO 3in1 creative construction toys let kids enjoy hours of imaginative play as they build 3 different colorful models in every box The toy robot has a posable head, legs, feet, arms, hands & wings; the dragon model is also fully posable; the plane toy has adjustable wings Look out for other fun LEGO Creator 3 in 1 sets: Sunken Treasure Mission (31130), Space Roller Coaster (31142), and Fantasy Forest Creatures (31125) Portable size – the 5.

item.title: LEGO Minecraft The Pumpkin Farm 21248 Building Toy Hands-on Action in The Swamp Biome Featuring Steve a Witch Frog Boat Treasure Chest and Pumpkin Patch Minecraft Toy for Boys and Girls Aged 8+
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Minecraft The Pumpkin Farm 21248 Building Toy Hands-on Action in The Swamp Biome Featuring Steve a Witch Frog Boat Treasure Chest and Pumpkin Patch Minecraft Toy for Boys and Girls Aged 8+ at the following link: ℹ️: Gift for kids– Give Minecraft players aged 8 and up a holiday, any-day or birthday gift with this versatile real-world Minecraft playset Many ways to play – Kids can build a pumpkin-shaped house, tend a pumpkin patch, battle a potion-flinging witch, sail a boat and combine ingredients to make pumpkin pie Safety assured – LEGO bricks and pieces are dropped, heated, crushed, twisted and analyzed to make sure they satisfy rigorous global safety standards Quality guaranteed – LEGO components meet stringent industry quality standards to ensure they are consistent, compatible and easy to build with Endlessly reconfigurable – The playset measures over 4 in.

item.title: LEGO DREAMZzz Crocodile Car 71458 Building Toy Set Rebuilds from Car to Off-Roader Truck Toy and Mini-Boat Features Cooper Jayden and The Night Hunter Minifigures Birthday Gift for 8 Year Olds
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DREAMZzz Crocodile Car 71458 Building Toy Set Rebuilds from Car to Off-Roader Truck Toy and Mini-Boat Features Cooper Jayden and The Night Hunter Minifigures Birthday Gift for 8 Year Olds here: ℹ️: Croc mode – In croc mode, the car launches discs out of its grille (the croc’s mouth) and has posable arms and legs to make it easy for kids to play and create adventures Dimensions – In its largest form, the model measures over 3 in.

item.title: LEGO Star Wars 2023 Advent Calendar 75366 Christmas Holiday Countdown Gift Idea with 9 Star Wars Characters and 15 Mini Building Toys Discover New Experiences and Daily Collectible Surprises
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars 2023 Advent Calendar 75366 Christmas Holiday Countdown Gift Idea with 9 Star Wars Characters and 15 Mini Building Toys Discover New Experiences and Daily Collectible Surprises with a discount here: ℹ️: Fun toy building kits for all ages – LEGO Star Wars sets enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to recreate iconic scenes, role-play their own creative stories or simply display the brick-built models 5 other mini builds – Clone Command Center, Ewok village, Endor bunker, Endor shield protector and Emperor’s throne 2023 LEGO Star Wars Advent Calendar (75366) – Build festive joy during the Christmas holidays with an Advent calendar featuring daily collectible surprises including Star Wars characters, mini building toy vehicles and accessories Christmas holiday countdown gift idea – Give this 320-piece LEGO Star Wars Advent Calendar as a Christmas holiday gift to kids ages 6 and up Creative fun – Includes characters and builds to discover new experiences and play out Star Wars: Return of the Jedi, Star Wars: The Clone Wars and Star Wars: The Bad Batch stories and to use with other LEGO Star Wars sets 10 mini vehicle building toys – The Justifier, The Mandalorian’s N-1 Starfighter, a turbo tank, STAP speeder, AAT, Imperial Shuttle, AT-ST, speeder bike, Imperial Star Destroyer and Ewok glider 9 Star Wars characters – Includes Emperor Palpatine, an Ewok and a Pit Droid in holiday outfits, a Gonk Droid dressed as a reindeer, Omega with a sled, a 212th Clone Trooper, B-1 Battle Droid and Princess Leia 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: Lego Friends Leo s Room 41754 Baking Themed Bedroom Playset Collectible Toy for Girls and Boys with Olly Mini-Doll Accessories & Pet
item.description: There’s a deal Lego Friends Leo s Room 41754 Baking Themed Bedroom Playset Collectible Toy for Girls and Boys with Olly Mini-Doll Accessories & Pet here: ℹ️: This collectible LEGO Friends Leos Room playset toy features a studio and video equipment, a baking area plus 2 mini-dolls and a cat figure This LEGO Friends Bedroom x000D In 2023, the LEGO Friends universe expanded to present a new series of characters and fun locations inspired by childrens passions and interests This mini-doll playset includes many cool accessories: a recipe book, mixing bowl, spoon, bottles, camera plus cool light for the camera Playset includes LEGO Friends mini-dolls: baker Leo and video expert Olly to help filming, plus Churro the Cat figure Let kids discover all the rooms of the Heartlake City; check out other collectible toy playsets like Aliyas Room (41740) or Novas Room (41755) Leos house in Harmony Beach includes surfboard toy plus bunk beds and a balcony to go outside and play football on when the filming is finished 🛒 Buy it now!
